_comment: Curated, cited list of FDA tissue-agnostic (tumor-agnostic) and landmark basket approvals. Each entry: biomarker, drug, year of the tissue-agnostic approval, a supporting PubMed PMID for the pivotal evidence, and a real https url. Compiled and verified against PubMed metadata July 2026. Every PMID here was confirmed to resolve to the stated pivotal study. Do not add an entry without a real PMID.

approvals.note: First FDA tissue-agnostic approval (May 2017). KEYNOTE-158 noncolorectal MSI-H cohort (Marabelle et al., J Clin Oncol 2020) is the pivotal readout; PMID confirmed.
FDA tissue-agnostic approval (June 2020) for TMB-high (10 or more mutations per megabase). Marabelle et al., Lancet Oncol 2020, KEYNOTE-158 TMB analysis; PMID confirmed.
FDA tissue-agnostic approval (Aug 2021) for dMMR recurrent or advanced solid tumors. GARNET dMMR monotherapy readout (Andre et al., JAMA Netw Open 2023); PMID confirmed.
FDA tissue-agnostic approval (Nov 2018) for NTRK fusion positive solid tumors. Hong et al., Lancet Oncol 2020 pooled analysis; PMID confirmed.
FDA tissue-agnostic approval (Aug 2019) for NTRK fusion positive solid tumors. Doebele et al., Lancet Oncol 2020 integrated analysis of three phase 1 to 2 trials; PMID confirmed.

FDA tissue-agnostic approval (June 2022) for BRAF V600E solid tumors (excluding colorectal). ROAR basket biliary tract cohort (Subbiah et al., Lancet Oncol 2020) is representative pivotal basket evidence; PMID confirmed.
FDA tissue-agnostic approval (Sept 2022) for RET fusion positive solid tumors. Subbiah et al., Lancet Oncol 2022 tumor-agnostic LIBRETTO-001 analysis; PMID confirmed.
FDA tissue-agnostic approval (April 2024) for HER2 IHC 3+ solid tumors. DESTINY-PanTumor02 (Meric-Bernstam et al., J Clin Oncol 2023); PMID confirmed.
